ctxMarket: Attention is on Solana’s growing on-chain activity, major platform milestones, and security incidents. Cross-chain expansion and identity solutions are also drawing interest.
ctxTalking:
• Pump.fun surpassing $1B in revenue and signaling cross-chain ambitions
• Security breach on Bonk.fun’s website leading to wallet-draining phishing attacks
• Polychain’s $10M investment in VeryAI’s palm-scan identity system on Solana
ctxMatters: Pump.fun’s revenue milestone and cross-chain signals highlight Solana’s role in platform growth and interoperability. The Bonk.fun hack underscores ongoing security risks for users and projects. Investment in biometric identity tools suggests a push for better user verification and privacy on Solana.
ctxSignal:
Signal: Pump.fun’s revenue and cross-chain moves, and Polychain’s backing of on-chain identity tech.
Noise: Minimal losses reported from the Bonk.fun hack may not reflect broader security concerns.
ctxGlossary:
Phishing — A scam where attackers trick users into revealing sensitive information or draining wallets.
On-chain verification — Confirming user actions or identities directly on the blockchain.

readMore.title: Polychain backs VeryAI’s $10M raise to build palm-scan identity system on Solana
FTX estate moves $17M in Solana while network staking activity remains strong
Pump.fun becomes Solana’s first $1B revenue platform as Ethereum, Base, BSC and Monad subdomains hint at cross-chain move
